summary: The CI job failed because `pnpm` was not installed on the runner when the `format` recipe tried to invoke it. The `just` recipe `format` called `pnpm format`, which returned exit code 127 (command not found), causing the parent recipe `gen-all` to also fail.
root_cause: The `pnpm` package manager was not installed on the runner, so the `just` recipe `format` failed with `sh: 1: pnpm: not found` (exit code 127).

evidence.reason: The `format` recipe attempted to run `pnpm format`, triggering the failure.
The shell could not find the `pnpm` binary, confirming it was not installed on the runner.

evidence.quote: error: Recipe `format` failed on line 221 with exit code 127
evidence.reason: Exit code 127 is the standard shell exit code for 'command not found', confirming pnpm was missing.

evidence.quote: error: Recipe `gen-all` failed on line 32 with exit code 127
evidence.reason: The parent `gen-all` recipe failed as a direct consequence of the `format` recipe failure.

suggested_fix: Add a step to install `pnpm` on the runner before the `gen-all`/`format` recipe runs, e.g., using `npm install -g pnpm` or the official `pnpm/action-setup` GitHub Action.
